metadata.description: Developer-experience extras for Claude Code: spoken notifications, an enriched statusline, and a protected-branch guard.

plugins.name: voice-notify
plugins.description: Spoken macOS notifications (via `say`) when Claude needs your attention or finishes a turn. Rotating first-person phrases, configurable voice.

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Enriched two-line statusline: user@host, cwd, branch/worktree, task focus, model, effort, context and rate-limit usage.

plugins.name: git-guard
plugins.description: Block accidental commits, merges and pushes to protected branches (main/master) before they run. Selectable policies, configurable branch lists.
